entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502: Final What's New & Product Assistance available
entry.content:
Hi @Diana, 

the possibility to add comments in What's New Viewer sounds especially interesting. But it doesn't work for me, despite being logged on to Help Portal. Can you give some further hints?  

Thank you and best regards,

Andrea

entry.title: Re: Important Notice: Changes in SAP Analytics Cloud Classic Stories & Analytic Applications
entry.content:
Hello,

I am having some problems with the "Presentation Mode" that replaces the Digital Boardroom.
I have 3 Classic Stories and 1 DBR.
I converted the Classic Stories to Optimized mode. I started with the story with more pages and imported the pages from the other two stories.
The first problem I had is that if there are objects such as "Select Measure" and "Select Dimension" within the story that is being imported, these objects are lost when you do the import, forcing you to manually modify the story, which did not happen with the DBR.
This is obviously a problem and adds more work as most of the stories we have built have dynamic filters.
The second problem I have is that when I create the presentation by setting up the different Topic, the filters do not work with the tables within the dashboard, but work correctly with all the other objects, graphs and KPIs.
When I use the flat presentation that is provided by default, this problem does not occur.
Has anyone else experienced these issues?

Thanks in advance, 

Marsida

entry.title: Re: Modify the Financial Review booklet
entry.content:
v_23 this happened to us as well and we replicated some steps again and it fixed. Maybe you can try as well.

1- De-implement 3418650 and 3520907 together

2- Run SAP_BW_SETUP_INITIAL_S4HANA in the background from STC01 TCODE (SNOTE 3463494)

3- Implement 3418650 and 3520907 again

entry.title: Re: US taxing procedure TAXUSJ to 0TXUSX
entry.content: @ShreyaThank you for the information. What about change from External TAXUSX) to Internal (0TXUSJ)?

entry.title: 32bit crystal reports .net runtime discontinued in Dec 2025
entry.content:
Hello,

According to Mainstream Maintenance Dates site (photo attached below) the 32 bit CR .NET runtime will be discontinued in Dec 2025.  Looking for guidance as to what this specifically means for our application.  The recommendation says to move to 64bit runtime and implicitly this requires using Visual Studio 2022.  We are currently on VS 2019 and won't be in any position to upgrade to VS2022 anytime this year.  We definitely are going to perform this migration, however, this probably won't take place until 2026.

My question is will the 32 bit runtime still work into 2026+, assuming our application remains static and no further updates are made.  At least, this will give an idea that we can keep the current system in place while we make to effort to update the runtime.  The term "Discontinued" is interpreted by me to be no further support for the 32bit runtime by SAP but will continue to work assuming everything else systems-wise remains the same.

In addition out of curiousity and although probably costly, will SAP provide any paid support of the 32 bit runtime for those who cannot make the upgrade to 64bit this year?

@DonWilliams , you mentioned a little bit about the discontinuation here .  Is there any more information you can provide related to my query?

 

Thank you,

Alan

SAP Crystal Reports, version for Visual Studio

entry.title: CAP + Fiori elements V4 to handle external service without draft
entry.content:
Hello

We are facing many cases where we need to implement a CAP + Fiori Elements V4 application to handle data from external services, for example S4 Cloud, Cloud for customer (CX), etc.

Basically: list report apps for the remote entites, with complete CRUD operations. We want Fiori Elements V4 for flexible extendibility. The issue is that it is not really usable because of the mandatory draft functionality.

Is there a way to get around it? How would you implement such use cases?

Thanks,

Zsolt

entry.title: Re: 'To delete or not delete, that is the question' - SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Public Edition - Blog Serie
entry.content:
Great post. I was wondering why this customizing "deletion" button was greyed out so this clarifies it.

However, this is really annoying and borderline insane that SAP does not support the simple deletion of certain items like loading group, storage locations or shipping point determinations. Keeping the core clean should also include getting it clean, removing unneccessary, confusing and obsolete configuration items. Its all about the user experience right? And having multiple: "do not use" items in the list for sure doesn't help at all. SAP do better.

entry.title: Re: Activate Joule for SAP SuccessFactors HCM
entry.content: Hi Fabian, thanks for  explaining these new topics.

entry.title: BDC creation with SM35 to adapt field in transaction code BP
entry.content:
Dear community,

currently I am facing a problem while running a recorded BDC map with SM35.

There is one step which is not really working. Within the screen there is a special section where a table is integrated. It can happens that the first rows are filled and my new entry need to put to the end. But my intention was to do 3 page down actions because there cannot be an existing entry and put it there into the first row. But I have not found the correct OK Code for this action.

I tried /00 and also /P+ but it was not working. 

Do you have any suggestion how I can solve this problems. Thanks a lot on adavnace. 

Best Regards

Alex

 

Example of my recording:

entry.title: Re: Group Reporting and Preperation Ledger
entry.content:
Please create customer incident for the possibility of change GRPL starting year if the S/4 is a green installation on S/4 HANA 2022 and onwards with GRPL activated by default from 1001.
In addition, please refer to the attachment "How_to_GRPL_in_alignment_with_Group_Reporting_published_2.pdf" in note 2659672-FAQ About SAP S/4HANA Finance for Group Reporting (On Premise)

entry.title: Are you a Business User and want to learn the basics of Concur Request?
entry.content:
I  recommend to access our Getting Started with Concur Standard Request for Business Users learning journey.

Overview
This learning journey is an introduction to Concur Request for Business Users. In this comprehensive journey, you will learn the basics of Concur Request, from creating and working with requests to reviewing and approving them as an approver.

Learning objectives
After completing this course, business users will be able to proficiently manage their requests by using the Concur Request platform to submit, approve, and process requests.

Prerequisites

  • A general understanding of SAP Concur including Concur Expense and Concur Travel.

 Pass all the quizzes and receive a digital badge

Please ask a question related to the digital learning Journey in the Q&A area. 

Our SAP Learning Experts will get back to you as soon as possible! We are here to support you. 

I appreciate your feedback and we will make sure to continue sharing interesting topics.

Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: why this (messaging-prod@smtp-c1.ariba.com) email address is picked when supplier sending mesaage to
entry.content: we are recieving emails from the above mail address, when suppliers are sending messages to the project team by using compose message option in sourcing event.

entry.title: Re: For an in-depth look at clean core and how to implement it, read our Clean Core Extensibility pa
entry.content: Sorry Ali, I fixed the link in my comment, which is https://discovery-center.cloud.sap/missiondetail/4420/4706

entry.title: Re: After adding new fields in existing proxy structure PI side, How to regenerate in ABAP system

Hi @former_member1716 thanks for your contribution.

I also need to add a field to the proxy that was previously added in the web service but I don't have the option you mention enabled. Is it a permissions issue?

Thanks a lot!!

entry.title: Re: BDC creation with SM35 to adapt field in transaction code BP
Re: SAP CPI SFTP Adapter configuration from PuTTY Private Key(.ppk) File
entry.content:
Hi  Stephn,


Thanks for sharing this blog.

i tried to do this but failing at "pem to x509 conversion.getting this error. pls check if you know the reason:

 

100000000A000000:error:1608010C:STORE routines:ossl_store_handle_load_result:unsupported:crypto/store/store_result.c:151:
100000000A000000:error:1608010C:STORE routines:ossl_store_handle_load_result:unsupported:crypto/store/store_result.c:151:
100000000A000000:error:1E08010C:DECODER routines:OSSL_DECODER_from_bio:unsupported:crypto/encode_decode/decoder_lib.c:101:No supported data to decode.
100000000A000000:error:1608010C:STORE routines:ossl_store_handle_load_result:unsupported:crypto/store/store_result.c:151:
100000000A000000:error:1608010C:STORE routines:ossl_store_handle_load_result:unsupported:crypto/store/store_result.c:151:
100000000A000000:error:1E08010C:DECODER routines:OSSL_DECODER_from_bio:unsupported:crypto/encode_decode/decoder_lib.c:101:No supported data to decode.
100000000A000000:error:1608010C:STORE routines:ossl_store_handle_load_result:unsupported:crypto/store/store_result.c:151:




thanks and regards,

Pooja

entry.title: Re: U.S Tax Reporter Year End 2024
entry.content: Hi.  Our Box 14 text on the W-2 changed. Some are no longer displaying the Wage Type Text. The Box 14 text is now displaying a mix of Wage Type Text and Tax form group text as "Box 14 amount 1", "Box 14 amount 5", "Box 14 amount 8" etc.  I reviewed the tax form groups W24A thru W24J and nothing has changed so unsure of next steps.  Could you please tell me how to correct this?

entry.title: Re: Automatic postings don't keep the custom dimension fi...
entry.content:
My understanding is that such automatic posting is similar to ANI process. Please refer to following link that ANI process does not support the custom field.

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/4ebf1502064b406c964b0911adfb3f01/4a307f655cd54dfb9f93df681d116a83.html

entry.title: Re: Credit note automatically deducted from invoice balance
entry.content:
Hi Jitin,

Thanks for your response. I assumed creating standalone credit notes would be the solution. Is there a way to link them to the original invoice (like the relationship map does) or is it just a case of adding the invoice details in the remarks box?

Thanks,

Martin.

entry.title: Re: Understanding the rollup hierarchy method of planning
entry.content:
Hi @ErikaT 

It's most likely an issue with your EC rules rather than the rollup code you use with the template.

Unfortunately I cannot see the screenshot of your rule. Can you share it again as well as the filtering one if you have one in place ?

What I do in these cases is I remove any conditions in the rules or make a very simple one to check whether it does import inactive employees. And then I add back my conditions little by little until I single out the root cause.

All the best

Xavier

entry.title: Import Sales Order Application does not support documents Type CR/DR
entry.content:
We are utilizing the "Import sales order" application to generate multiple sales orders.

Upon attempting to upload credit/debit memo requests, we receive an error message indicating that the request is "Invalid."


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Import Sales Order Application does not support docum...
entry.content:
Please use one of the following apps instead:

https://fioriappslibrary.hana.ondemand.com/sap/fix/externalViewer/#/detail/Apps('F7062')/S33

https://fioriappslibrary.hana.ondemand.com/sap/fix/externalViewer/#/detail/Apps('F7061')/S33

entry.title: Re: SAP BRIM Prepayment functionality for Solution quotat...
entry.content: Thanks a lot Deepak

entry.title: Unable to extract data from BW Queries to Datasphere
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I am trying to extracting the data from BW queries to Datasphere, I am getting the below error message. As i checked the Trace (ST01), there is no Auth error in the trace.

2025-01-16 06:46:13,909 [ERROR] [852a8bfd-328d-48e0-a29e-c38d50d7e7e555806] ABAPAdapter | ABAPAdapter$6.run [] - Error while trying to preload table and description dictionary : com.sap.conn.jco.JCoException: (104) JCO_ERROR_SYSTEM_FAILURE: You do not have authorization for this function (raised by system [QIS|rb3qisa0.server.bosch.com|46]) Message 868 of class SO type E

2025-01-16 06:46:13,925 [ERROR] [528b373c-b217-430e-8688-d96956b9e40d47119] ABAPAdapter | ABAPAdapter$6.run [] - Error while trying to preload table and description dictionary : com.sap.conn.jco.JCoException: (104) JCO_ERROR_SYSTEM_FAILURE: You do not have authorization for this function (raised by system [QIS|rb3qisa0.server.bosch.com|46]) Message 868 of class SO type E

2025-01-16 06:46:17,081 [ERROR] [7aa3869f-f332-4c11-b5c8-0ce3be45d60156630] ABAPAdapter | ABAPAdapter$6.run [] - Error while trying to preload table and description dictionary : com.sap.conn.jco.JCoException: (104) JCO_ERROR_SYSTEM_FAILURE: You do not have authorization for this function (raised by system [QIS|rb3qisa0.server.bosch.com|46]) Message 868 of class SO type E

2025-01-16 06:46:17,112 [ERROR] [fa8b6571-ba08-45bb-95f0-7e021f60e6b44750] ABAPAdapter | ABAPAdapter$6.run [] - Error while trying to preload table and description dictionary : com.sap.conn.jco.JCoException: (104) JCO_ERROR_SYSTEM_FAILURE: You do not have authorization for this function (raised by system [QIS|rb3qisa0.server.bosch.com|46]) Message 868 of class SO type E

2025-01-16 06:46:24,519 [ERROR] [19cc6ece-85fe-4df6-ad39-4a19dee4a83213619] ABAPAdapter | ABAPAdapter$6.run [] - Error while trying to preload table and description dictionary : com.sap.conn.jco.JCoException: (104) JCO_ERROR_SYSTEM_FAILURE: You do not have authorization for this function (raised by system [QIS|rb3qisa0.server.bosch.com|46]) Message 868 of class SO type E

2025-01-16 06:46:24,566 [ERROR] [446d36ee-cd6f-4db0-90dd-deb3955bed2249536] ABAPAdapter | ABAPAdapter$6.run [] - Error while trying to preload table and description dictionary : com.sap.conn.jco.JCoException: (104) JCO_ERROR_SYSTEM_FAILURE: You do not have authorization for this function (raised by system [QIS|rb3qisa0.server.bosch.com|46]) Message 868 of class SO type E

2025-01-16 06:46:24,894 [ERROR] [675fb19e-9733-43a2-803a-1c3a4555aaa463041] ABAPAdapter | ABAPAdapter$6.run [] - Error while trying to preload table and description dictionary : com.sap.conn.jco.JCoException: (104) JCO_ERROR_SYSTEM_FAILURE: You do not have authorization for this function (raised by system [QIS|rb3qisa0.server.bosch.com|46]) Message 868 of class SO type E

2025-01-16 06:47:05,566 [ERROR] [f5c5921d-31b5-4a93-aede-299b12909c857777] ABAPAdapter | TableLoaderExtractor.checkError [] - Error for "BW"."LSUPCI_600M_SDS_I11" : Error while accessing Error while extracting from source 6ZTF41N0V8B3IKEBNSOYN14HN (type InfoProvider) An exception was raised.

2025-01-16 06:47:05,566 [ERROR] [f5c5921d-31b5-4a93-aede-299b12909c857777] DPFramework | AsyncHandler.processStreamingExecuteStatement [] - AH(41897): Exception while processing request "SDA Response for ABAPAdapter of type SUCCESS_MSG responding to STREAMING_SET_STATEMENT"

2025-01-16 06:47:05,566 [ERROR] [f5c5921d-31b5-4a93-aede-299b12909c857777] DPFramework | AsyncHandler.processStreamingExecuteStatement [] - AH(41897): com.sap.hana.dp.adapter.sdk.AdapterException: Error for "BW"."LSUPCI_600M_SDS_I11" : Error while accessing Error while extracting from source 6ZTF41N0V8B3IKEBNSOYN14HN (type InfoProvider) An exception was raised. Context: Error for "BW"."LSUPCI_600M_SDS_I11" : Error while accessing Error while extracting from source 6ZTF41N0V8B3IKEBNSOYN14HN (type InfoProvider) An exception was raised.

                                at com.sap.hana.dp.abapadapter.TableLoaderExtractor.checkError(TableLoaderExtractor.java:954)

                                at com.sap.hana.dp.abapadapter.TableLoaderExtractor.odpFetchNext(TableLoaderExtractor.java:973)

                                at com.sap.hana.dp.abapadapter.TableLoaderExtractor.executeStatement(TableLoaderExtractor.java:1583)

                                at com.sap.hana.dp.abapadapter.ABAPAdapter.executeStatemen...

Thanks.

entry.title: Export Report Structure Only in HTML Format Using SAP BusinessObjects RESTful Web Service SDK
entry.content:
I am working with SAP BusinessObjects RESTful Web Service SDK, and my goal is to export a report without the associated data. I would like to extract only the structure of the report in HTML format, as shown in the image

I have reviewed the official documentation but couldn't find specific information on how to export just the structure of the report without including the business data.

Question

Is there a way to export a report (without data) in HTML format using SAP BusinessObjects RESTful Web Service SDK? If yes, which endpoints and parameters should I use?

If anyone has suggestions on how to address this issue or knows alternative approaches, I would greatly appreciate your input!

entry.title: Can SAP reject network number inputs of closed WBS elements in CAT2?
entry.content:
In our process we close out WBS Elements when we've finished the project. Some customers will request reworks or additional labor and we will create a new WBS element for the new project. However employees will refer to the work as the old projects name, and this can cause employees to submit time to a closed project.

Is there a way to restrict the network number inputs in CAT2 to only allow the submission of active WBS elements?

Let me know, Thank you.

entry.title: Re: How to query a customer's credit exposure data through the interface
entry.content: Hello, thank you for your question. It has been forwarded to the experts. Kind regards, Henrike

entry.title: Re: Creating unit test data in the RAP context
entry.content:
I was finally able to solve the problem without by-passing the base view.

@MioYasutakeYou were right to set the parameter i_select_base_dependencies = abap_true. The error I did all along was that I set it only for Entity A not also entity B.

For completness sake, here the pseudo code:

cds_test_environment = cl_cds_test_environment=>     cds_test_environment = cl_cds_test_environment=>create_for_multiple_cds(
                               VALUE #(
                                       ( i_for_entity = 'Z_I_ENTITY_A' i_select_base_dependencies = ABAP_TRUE )
                                       ( i_for_entity = 'Z_I_ENTITY_B' i_select_base_dependencies = ABAP_TRUE )
                                     )
                             ).

DATA my_mock_data TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF Z_A_ENTITY_A.
" Fill my_mock_data with test data values
...
" Insert test data
cds_test_environment->insert_test_data( i_data = my_mock_data ).

entry.title: Re: Customize printout format
entry.content: Hello, thank you for your question. It has been forwarded to the experts. Kind regards, Henrike

entry.title: MIRO ERROR
entry.content: I GOT THIS ERROR WHEN POSTING MIRO

entry.title: Would require vendor short pay enhancement configuration step in SAP S4 HANA
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Could you please provide configuration steps for vendor short pay enhancements which can be done in SAP S4 HANA? also kindly provide videos with regards to this topic.

Regards,

Chinnavva

entry.title: Impact of Enforcing SSO on Inviting External User in SAP Signavio
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

We have a question related to SSO Enforcement in SAP Signavio.

What is the impact in inviting external users if we enforce SSO login in SAP Signavio, where the external users are supposed not in our companies domain?

Scenario: actually we would like to not only ensure that all the internal users must login Signavio with SSO (by enforcing SSO), but also want to invite external users to come into the tool to provide comment and feedback.

Not sure if enforcing SSO will prevent us from inviting the external users. If yes, any experience from you if you already find a way out to achieve the scenario?

The help guides seems less talking about this specific situation.

Thank you all!

Regards,
Max

entry.title: Re: How Periodic Billing Plan is Generated for Service Contract Items
entry.content:
Hello,

Once the billing plan for the service contract has been created, is there a way to add the quantity of materials/services consumed in a specific period using SCN2 so that the invoice reflects that amount instead of the system-determined quantity, which is the total item value divided by the contract duration in months?

Thanks you

entry.title: Re: U.S Tax Reporter Year End 2024
entry.content:
Hi 3Dianjo,

We had not applied note  0003412754  that was delivered in K0 so had to manually update the text for Box 14 values.

Thanks

Anjali

entry.title: Re: PostgreSQL on SAP BTP - Activate (create) an extension using pgAdmin tool
entry.content:
Hi @rskumarv80,

When deleting the app please make sure you delete also the routes, using cf command.

Regards, Antonio

entry.title: Re: SAP Mobile Start fails to load App
entry.content:
Hi sascha,

Thank you very much for your reply,

I have read the note, but I am unable to set the semantic object and the app action in the content manager of Workzone because I cannot modify it since the app has already been deployed. I should be able to set it up beforehand, but from the SAP Build development environment, I don't see a way to make this configuration. Could you please tell me the steps to perform this configuration?

Kind regards,
Diego

entry.title: Re: SMB Adapter for SAP Integration Suite
entry.content:
Hello Swati_Singh,

is it possible to access a SMB server via cloud connector in a local environment? I tried it, but so far, I could not make it run.

Research did not bring any topics regarding SMB Receiving Adapter and Cloud Connector.

Thanks in advance.
Thimo

entry.title: Run NodeJS app locally using destination and connectivity services
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

lately I have been trying to create a NodeJS app using NestJS and the SAP Cloud SDK for javascript and deploy it to the cloud foundry runtime according to this example: https://github.com/SAP-samples/cloud-sdk-js?tab=readme-ov-file

I created a new service, generated the odata client using an edmx file of our on premise service and deployed it. 

The deployed version is fine: I can read data and consume the odata service. 
In local mode the destination fails. 

I found this blogpost telling me how to check the connectivity of my destination. 
Using the curl request results in this:

 

curl -v -i "<destinationName>.dest/sap/opu/odata/iwfnd/catalogservice;v=2/ServiceCollection?%24top=1"
* Uses proxy env variable no_proxy == 'localhost,127.0.0.1,github.com,.github.com,.npmjs.org,.yarnpkg.com,npm.sap.com,.maven.apache.org,.repo-cache.svc.cluster.local'
* Uses proxy env variable http_proxy == 'http://127.0.0.1:8887'
*   Trying 127.0.0.1:8887...
* Connected to 127.0.0.1 (127.0.0.1) port 8887 (#0)
> GET http://<destinationName>.dest/sap/opu/odata/iwfnd/catalogservice;v=2/ServiceCollection?%24top=1 HTTP/1.1
> Host: sd_orca_sap_ecc_akab.dest
> User-Agent: curl/7.88.1
> Accept: */*
> Proxy-Connection: Keep-Alive
> 
< HTTP/1.1 500 Internal Server Error
HTTP/1.1 500 Internal Server Error
< Content-Type: text/plain; charset=utf-8
Content-Type: text/plain; charset=utf-8
< X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff
X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff
< Date: Thu, 16 Jan 2025 17:10:28 GMT
Date: Thu, 16 Jan 2025 17:10:28 GMT
< Content-Length: 75
Content-Length: 75

< 
dial tcp: lookup <destinationName>.dest on 100.64.0.10:53: no such host
* Connection #0 to host 127.0.0.1 left intact

 

I also created a .env file that should change the proxy settings:

destinations="[{"name": "<destinationName>","url": "http://<destinationName>.dest","proxyConfiguration":{"host": "127.0.0.1","port": 8887,"protocol":"http"}}]"

 

My destination looks like this:

The destination is created on subaccount level. 
After changing the destination i also called the reload request Andre mentioned in his blogpost.

My default-env.json and default-services.json files both contain the configuration to the destination, connectivity and xsuaa service I created for the app. The variables are created using the cf env myapp > .env command. 
I am quite sure the service is found. Removing the destination service from these files results in another error: "Could not find service binding of type 'destination'".

 

At this point I am very desperate in trying to start my app locally. 

Any help is appreciated, thank you already in advance!

entry.title: Re: Please let us know how the issue was solved as we had face the same issue.
entry.content: Hello. This appears to be a comment for an existing post. Recommend you commenting this on the relevant post. Thanks!

entry.title: Re: Transport auf Multi-Target-Applications between Subaccounts
entry.content: Hi @BorisZarske, amazing ! I will send you a message.

entry.title: Re: U.S Tax Reporter Year End 2024
entry.content: Hi @Anjali.  Thank you.   We applied note 3412754 last year, Jan 2024. To manually update Box 14 values, could you please tell me where do I go?  Thank you.

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA – Upgrade Faster – Resolving CDS view lifecycle impacts
entry.content:
Hi Rahullohia,

I would not recommend extending standard CDS views to include the element you want to use. During the next upgrade, if SAP adds it under a different name, you will encounter errors in the shadow instance—not only in this CDS view but also in all related CDS views.

"If the numbers are small enough and the shadow instance is available for changes, a developer can try to fix the CDS views."

The problem is: in the shadow instance, you cannot check or activate anything. So, you try to correct it, run the upgrade step again, encounter errors again, and repeat the process until you identify all the impacted/related CDS views. It is a MESS.

Instead, I would recommend using an association on the DDIC table or a ZI_ CDS view that you create based on the underlying table containing all the fields.

entry.title: Re: Primeiro Meetup do ano de 2025
entry.content: Boa Marssel! Alguma sugestão de data já?

entry.title: Re: PMGM: Comment entered includes coding
entry.content:
Hi @AdrianBru 

This is something I would advise you report through a ticket that our support team can forward to engineering.

But the first question that came to my head was : why do Managers have access to English Debug ? it's supposed to be only for system administrators.

Thanks !

Xavier

entry.title: Re: Primeiro Meetup do ano de 2025
entry.content: Podemos agendar pra semana quem vem na quinta dia 23, o que acha?

entry.title: Increase "page size" or growing threshold in a responsive table
entry.content:
Dear colleagues,

Since "select all" checkbox was removed (3233426 - 'Select All' checkbox missing on S/4HANA Applications UI from SAP UI5 Version 1.97 to 1.120) selecting large number of items in Manage Billing Documents app is very cumbersome, the workaround of selecting the first element, press shift and select last element only works once all the elements have been displayed. To do that the user needs to press MORE, time after time until all values are displayed

Is there any way to load all elements at once to select all of them faster? Like adding a parameter to the url or setting growingThreshold through the browser dev tools...

 

Thanks in advance,

Best regards,

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA – Upgrade Faster – Resolving CDS view lifecycle impacts
entry.content:
Very good remark from MCH1.

Is there an official response to this case, which is not so uncommon?

Is it possible to have an official note/KBA to get a clear answer on how to handle this situation where the CDS does not contain one of the fields from the DDIC table?

 

Thank you.

entry.title: Tables used for SSAM Status
entry.content:
Good Day Gurus,

I would like to know what tables are used to store the status of the Work Orders and Operations within SSAM.  Typically the status' are 'Received', 'Started-Clocked In', 'On Hold' and 'Completed'

What I am attempting to do is to use SQVI or SQ00 to create a dashboard that will give Maintenance Supervision an 'at a glance' status of the work being performed in the plant.

Thank you in Advance for your assistance.
C. Thomas

entry.title: Re: U.S Tax Reporter Year End 2024
entry.content: @Anjali.  I think I found it.  Stay Tuned.  Thanks

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA Cloud 2502 Release: Everything You Need to Know
entry.content: UPDATED with the Final What’s New information, please use the What’s New Viewer.

entry.title: STO delivery doesn't reduce the PIR
entry.content:
Dear experts 

In SAP version 2023, we have some finished products managed with strategy 40. 

We have set the masterdata to be able to consumume the STO. Mixed MRP is 1 and the consumption indicator for planning requirements is 3. =>therefore when  STO is planned it reduces the PIRs. 

But when the delivery is created and after the post good issue the PIR reduction disappear and the WIThdrawal Qty MD73 is not updated. 

There is the note 

1819952

Stock transfer: Control the reduction of Planned Independent Requirements

but it doesn't help enough. In one hand the notes says

In the Customizing 'Assignment of Requirement types to Transaction' (Transaction OVZI) the field 'Origin of
requirement type in requirement type determination' is empty for the delivery item category and material MRP type
combination. If the value of this field is blank, the settings from the standard requirement class/type, assigned to the
planning strategy defined in the material master, will be considered.
In this case, the stock transfer will behave as a the sales order and reduce PIR

In other hand the notes says

For the STO delivery item category and MRP type combination you should Assign the value '1' to the field 'Assignment of
Requirement types to Transaction'. That way system will consider the requirement type defined here during the PIR reduction,
instead of the requirement type linked to the material master strategy.

HERE BELOW OUR SETTINGS

OVZI setting FOR THE ITEM DEL CAT

 

THANKS IN ADVANCE FOR YOUR SUPPORT 

@Caetano

entry.title: How to optimize the apps deployed on cloud foundry?
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I have deployed full stack cap project on cloud foundry. After deployement i get urls of apps and services which is like.
 

App url: https://----------.cfapps.us10-001.hana.ondemand.com/

Srv url: https://------------srv.cfapps.us10-001.hana.ondemand.com/


When i try to open app url, it take too much time for loading the library and generic files and to load the index page of app.

So, i want to ask that how can i optimize the loading time to load the app?

entry.title: Re: Sorting Table in Adobe forms (ByD)
entry.content: How did you solve it?

entry.title: RISE Security Questions
entry.content:
Hi,

Working with a customer who would like to understand a bit more around the security aspects of RISE, could anyone help with the following please:

1, Are the SAP PEN Testing reports available to the customer and is there anything omitted - or are they completely transparent ?

2, Do SAP use generic accounts to log into client 000 in RISE S/4HANA or named user ?

3, What level of Ransomware is included in the SAP end to end monitoring process in the Trust Centre with RSIE, is it part of the Malware software?

4, How long are the security logs kept for - what are the retention times broken down by each security log?

Thanks

Tim

entry.title: Client DLLs to be used for XI vs 2020 server.
entry.content:
Hello Gurus,

I have a (VS2010) C#.Net project that contains the references to CrystalReportsXI (CrystalDecision.CrystalReports.TemplateEngine and few other standard DLLs that start with "CrystalDecisions.ReportAppServer." - ClientDoc, CommonObjectModel, Controllers, DataDefModel, DataSetConversion, ObjectFactory and ReportDefModel). They all have the "Runtime Version" of v2.0.50727 and "Version" of 14.0.3500.0.

I'm tasked with upgrading the project/solution to use CrystalReports 2020, do I need to reference a special (newer?) set of client DLLs for this? If so, can these 2 sets (XI & 2020) co-exist in the same project? Also where I can download these DLLs (relevant for CR2020)?

Thank you.

entry.title: MIRO - Tax code for planned delivery cost via purchase order
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I have a question about tax codes for planned delivery costs.

When I create a purchase order, I include a tax code in the item details in ME21n. I also use the conditions for freight.

In the supplier invoice the tax code from the purchase order is not adopted for the delivery costs, just for the items. So I have to maintain these manually.

I saw the information to use 4 as subtotal but it did not work.

Is there a way to transfer a tax code for delivery costs from the purchase order to the supplier invoice?

 

Thanks and best regards.

entry.title: Re: Alternative qty unit KWH cannot be converted into base unit HR
entry.content: Issue solve with KP26

entry.title: Re: RAP : Error for Action with Deep Table Parameter - Me...
entry.content:
Hi,

I am facing the same issue on release 2023 system and have used this same workaround suggested in earlier comment. Looking at documentation it does say deep table parameters are not supported, although the language is not very convincing ( maybe because it depends on the oData service being UI or Webservice ).

https://help.sap.com/docs/abap-cloud/abap-rap/modeling-parameters-for-non-standard-operations

Exposure and Consumption of Operations with Parameters in RAP Services

The following restrictions apply on exposing operations with deep parameters:

OData V2 only allows non-standard operations with flat parameters. The service binding shows an error message if a non-standard operation with a deep parameter is included in the service.

The following types are generally not supported for OData exposure:
    • scalar types
    • deep table parameters
    • deep parameters as input or output parameters of functions.
    The service binding shows an error message if these kind of parameters are used in the service. Operations with these kind of parameters can be consumed via EML.

Fiori Elements UIs can't represent hierarchical structures by default. So deep parameters can't be consumed by these UIs.

entry.title: Consume protected destinations during development
entry.content:
I am facing an issue while developing my SAPUI5 app because I am unable to access the destinations during development mode.

I know there is a plugin that allows running BAS in VS Code, but even after using it, I am still unable to connect to the destination.

So, my question is: What needs to be done to set up a development environment that retrieves real data from the destinations configured for the SAPUI5 app?

entry.title: Re: Alternative qty unit H cannot be converted into base unit HL
entry.content: My issue resolved with KP26

entry.title: Function group SRFC and RFC_PING / RFC_SYSTEM_INFO requests
entry.content:
Dear community, 

We are evaluating monitoring and security aspects on development ABAP servers and would like to know if there is a direct way of invoking RFC_PING and RFC_SYSTEM_INFO using the RFCSDK without logon depending on values of auth/rfc_authority_check. 

We are mainly using Python socket scripts and pysap library to craft the packets and evaluate the response. However we are unable to construct a valid packet that would enable the testing. We tried replaying packets sent from one system to another using the function modules without success. 

 

Did anyone work on a similar topic and would have some insights ? 

 

Many thanks in advance !

entry.title: Re: Performance is poor for Select query on MBEW Table
entry.content: I didn't pay attention to what @Princejoshizal said about "it is having Replacement object MBV_MBEW(which is a CDS view MBV_MBEW) that means data is anyway pushed down to HANA DB". It's wrong, using a CDS view doesn't imply that it's executed on the (HANA) database server. Only CDS table functions and CDS scalar functions cannot be read by the ABAP SQL engine and can only be processed by the database..

entry.title: Issues with travel overpayments from Concur on payroll write days
entry.content: Hi, we have a daily Concur process that posts travel overpayments to employee records. On payroll write days, those overpayments fail to post, but we have neither a business process nor technical process in place to to address them, causing our Payroll team to have to manually enter any records that come in on the write days. How do you all handle this?

entry.title: Top menu toolbar is not clickable
entry.content:
For some time now, I have not been able to click on the menu with the "large" window.

When it is not maximized and part of the menu is "hidden" I can.

Any way to solve this?

Unable to click:

Clickable:

entry.title: Re: openSAP has moved: Find over 100 former openSAP courses on the SAP Learning site
entry.content:
@reblev Thanks for your question. 

Before the sunset of the platform, we announced the following: Once the platform is discontinued, verification links in records of achievements and digital badges will no longer work. The same applies to any social shares (for example references to openSAP in your LinkedIn profile). 

Therefore all learners were asked to download and save their documents (records of achievement, confirmations of participation, and digital badges), as they will no longer be accessible once the platform is discontinued. These documents are PDF files (for records of achievement, confirmations of participation) or gif files (for digital badges). 

Looking at your note, you are referring to a verification link. As explained, these links are not working any longer and can also not be restored. All openSAP profiles, included course completion data have been deleted. I am sorry to hear that you missed the information.

entry.title: Re: Performance is poor for Select query on MBEW Table
entry.content: Performance analysis is very complex, it depends on many factors. There are tools to help analyzing, I suggest you run them and provide their result. This should be done when asking a question about a specific database query. I'd like to see the arguments for concluding that "SALK3 and LBKUM are calculated from ACDOCA_M_EXTRACT" is the cause (of performance issue).

entry.title: Re: Suppler IBAN at payment
entry.content:
Hi Zainab,

The system is proposing correct IBAN only based on the entry maintained under supplier's bank master data. Irrespective of entry maintained under bank master data even though from from extension field, it always pick the 1st line entry. This is the standard process and behavior. System does not find any provision to pick up second entry. 

And system still keeps a provision to maintain it manually. If you need 2nd IBAN entry to be proposed in payment proposal remove the another entry and try to run a payment run as it will be updated in the payment proposal accordingly.

Please note that System always picks the first IBAN entry maintained under supplier's  bank master data.

Hope it clarifies.

Best Regards,

Abarna

entry.title: Re: 10 Steps to Clean Core for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition for Customers
entry.content: Hello, are there dates for the Partner version of this bootcamp?

entry.title: Re: Disenchantment: GPT for generating ABAP code documentation
entry.content:
I think this bot did exactly what you asked it to do. Which AI are you using? Your post seems to indicate ChatGPT, but ChatGPT can handle way more than 2 thousand characters (the default model, 4o, can handle 128,000 tokens in a message thread, which is the equivalent of about 300 pages of text in English). 

I think most of us generally under-specify what we want language models to do. If you want deeper explanations, you should ask in more detail for exactly what you want. 

This code is also somewhat isolated - it's a routine using z-tables that ChatGPT knows nothing about. It also doesn't know anything about the surrounding code in this subroutine. I suggest if you want an in-depth explanation, you should include the rest of the code for context, and then ask ChatGPT something like: 

"This is the codebase of my ABAP program ZBLOG_ENGINE. In it is a subroutine called SAVE_COMMENT. Can you explain what it does, where it fits in the larger program, and give me tips on how I could improve this code?"

[Paste the whole program]

I expect that if you approach it this way, you'll get far better results. And remember - you can always ask follow-up questions after ChatGPT responds, so if it doesn't quite meet your expectations...just tell it.

entry.title: Re: PMGM: Comment entered includes coding
entry.content: Long story why they have access to Debug. 🙂 But I found the issue, its connected to the browser's translation tool: https://me.sap.com/notes/3335105

entry.title: Re: Disenchantment: GPT for generating ABAP code documentation
entry.content:
Interesting experiment...

It looks like it decided to "AIsplain" what each command does. 🙂 Which would probably be helpful if the question was "I have no clue about this programming language, explain to me what this code is doing line by line".

I got slightly better result using the prompt "Acting as an experienced ABAP developer, explain in plain language what does this subroutine do" but it still ended up in the same "MOVE moves" type of information.

To be fair, the functional spec would explain "the why" of the code, which can't always be reverse-engineered. And naming (which these models would rely on) can be notoriously inaccurate or confusing. There is nothing (other than peer code review) from preventing a developer calling the routine SAVE_COMMENT but then have it do something completely different.

entry.title: Re: PMGM: Comment entered includes coding
entry.content: Long story why they have access.:) I found the issue, its connected to the browsers translation tool:https://me.sap.com/notes/3335105

entry.title: Re: Disenchantment: GPT for generating ABAP code documentation
entry.content: Sandra, I want to thank you for posting publicly (I may have sounded harsh in my above comment, and that was not my intention!). I think everyone benefits from seeing attempts (and failures) of AI to do what we want it to do.

entry.title: Re: Important Notice: Changes in SAP Analytics Cloud Classic Stories & Analytic Applications
entry.content:
Dear Marsida,

You can find a list of restrictions for objects not supported by import pages in this help documents: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_ANALYTICS_CLOUD/00f68c2e08b941f081002fd3691d86a7/122dd3bf9c3a466593f5344d9f22a89f.html?locale=en-US

After configuring the tree structure, do the filters work as expected when using view mode? If not, it points to a problem with how the story is set up. If they do work in view mode but not in present mode, this sounds like a bug. In this case please open a support case for our team to have a look.

Best,
Steffen

entry.title: Date to Factory Date Conversion with S/4HANA ABAP CDS view
entry.content:
I wish S/4HANA ABAP CDS views supported date-to-factory-date conversion using an out-of-the-box built-in function, similar to currency or unit conversion. Unfortunately, that’s not the case. But don’t worry—I’ve got you covered with a custom-built S/4HANA ABAP CDS view.

S/4HANA provides DATE_CONVERT_TO_FACTORYDATE standard function module for date-to-factory-date conversion. Base on factory, for example, CA Canada:

 

The function module converts date to closest next factory date (default "+" conversion option):

or closest prior factory date ("-" conversion option):

The same date-to-factory-date conversion can be achieved using custom-built ABAP CDS view 

All it takes a simple custom built ABAP CDS view

Above code does a trick transforming pivoted and nested factory calendar data 

into factory calendar on date level

followed by a couple of window functions to find next and previous factory date for first week-end / holiday day 

and copy it over to other week-end / holiday dates as well fill next factory date / previous factory date for weekdays.

Source code for the CDS view can be downloaded below:

ZI_FactoryCalendar 

ZCL_FACTORY_CALENDAR

entry.title: Re: Doubt for optimize abap code in BADI
entry.content:
Hi

The is triger by each employee and when is called the BADI the table is_ee_org_ass_repl_req-org_assignment, have all the organizational assignment only for this employee:

I need pass only the two last records to a internal table that I am named as lt_fin

 

DATA :lt_fin  TYPE TABLE OF SFIOM_S_REPL_REQ_ORG_ASS_EXTND .
  DATA(lv_cont) = lines( is_ee_org_ass_repl_req-org_assignment ).
  IF lv_cont >= 2.
  APPEND is_ee_org_ass_repl_req-org_assignment[ lv_cont - 1 ] TO lt_fin .
  APPEND is_ee_org_ass_repl_req-org_assignment[ lv_cont ] TO lt_fin.
ELSEIF lv_cont = 1.
  APPEND is_ee_org_ass_repl_req-org_assignment[ lv_cont ] TO lt_fin.
ENDIF.

 

And then I need do a loop to the table lt_fin, but an SELECT in LOOP generate issue of performance

 

LOOP AT lt_fin INTO DATA(ls_fin).
SELECT SINGLE persg FROM hrp1013 INTO @DATA(lv_empsgrp)
WHERE plvar = '01'
AND otype = 'S'
AND objid = @LS_fin-position_id
AND istat = '1'
AND begda LE @LSfin-end_date
AND endda GE @Fin-end_date.
IF SY-SUBRC = 0.
" Apply my logic here
ENDIF.
ENDLOOP.

 

I have checked the option of SELECT FOR ALL ENTRIES , and with this should be two loop?

Regards

entry.title: Re: openSAP has moved: Find over 100 former openSAP courses on the SAP Learning site
entry.content: I get that OpenSAP no longer works, but for those of us that did miss the email (easy to do for busy IT people), there should be a way to access the badge earned as recently as 2023.  I keep seeing references to Credly as a possibility to retrieve an OpenSAP badge.  Would this work?

entry.title: Re: SAP XI/PI excel to custom RFC
entry.content: the basis team refreshed the JCo Monitoring Metadata Cache of RFC and its working as expected. thanks for the ideas

entry.title: Duplicate Check not working after SP31 patch
entry.content:
Hi,

We have recently updated our system to SAP NW 7.50 SP31 patch. We have tried enabling/disabling the Duplicate file checking and added parameter duplicateCheckPersist with value 259200 but it is still processing the duplicate files. 

Can you suggests what else we can do to make the duplicate file checking work?

Thank you

entry.title: Re: SAP XI/PI excel to custom RFC
entry.content: the basis team refreshed the JCo Monitoring Metadata Cache of RFC and its now working as expected. thanks for the ideas

entry.title: Re: writing approval condition
entry.content:
Hi,

BaseType is stored at document line level as a document may draw from multiple base documents.

When there is no base document the PCH1.BaseType will be -1.  So your query could check for a MAX(PCH1.BaseType) = -1 to determine if there are no base documents.  Or MIN(PCH1.BaseType) = -1 to determine if the are at least some lines without base documents.

entry.title: Re: AI in SAP Build - Overview and Best Practices
entry.content:
Great blog post, thanks Marc!

I used the GenAI capabilities in Build Code to make a customer loyalty app in about an hour, it was a great way to get started and I'm looking forward to trying the GenAI features for making processes in SAP Build Process Automation.

If anyone else wants to try out Build Code and build your own loyalty app with a free trial account, I followed this guide from the SAP Discovery Center: https://discovery-center.cloud.sap/missiondetail/4441/4727/?tab=overview

entry.title: How to clear forecast when there is no history in SAP IBP
entry.content:
Hi IBP experts,

Can someone please advise as to how to approach a solution for the following scenario? 

So, I have noticed that there are times, when we run stat forecast models, we come across scenario from time to time where, say we had good history, so it generated forecast output. sometimes as time passes given SKU/Customer would have less history for whatever reason. What I have noticed is that, sometime the output in forecast kf the data will clear as there is not enough history and sometime the forecast kf in future does not get cleared when the history drops. Is there a way to automate this where system recognizes that there is not history and so if there is a forecast, it needs to be cleared.

entry.title: Re: S/4HANA-Mass Changes to Purchasing Info Records(PIR) using Fiori App
entry.content:
Hello All, 

I know this is an "old" thread but, has anyone faced this error while trying to do the mass change?

Sorry the Fiori is in Portugese language, but the error occurs as follows:

I am using the 'Mass Changes to Purchasing Info Records' APP to change multiple info record details simultaneously. 
The Update fails with error: "THE JOB FAILED"

I checked SAP Note 3154222, but it did not help.

Regards.

Samuel B.

entry.title: Missing Execution ID in SAP AI Launchpad After Connecting AWS S3 Bucket via Object Store Secret
entry.content: I'm using SAP AI Launchpad. I created an Object Store Secret and connected it to my bucket in AWS, as it is a demo the S3 has admin role privilege in order tu access and has an access point, but in my dataset in SAP AI Launchpad, I don't see an execution ID. What can I do?

entry.title: Re: SAP ILM : Blocking a partner does not work
entry.content:
I found the solution.

 

I add a authorization group.

entry.title: Re: Windows Username automatically populating sapshcut.exe
entry.content:
Hello Folks,

It's not recommended at all add user and password to shortcuts... Doing so could make it much easier for an attacker who manages to gain access to a PC to obtain the credentials.

See SAP Note 103019 - SAP shortcut: Program parameters

you may consider using other authentication methods (e.g SSO...)

 

 

But here is the actual answer you want:

If the parameter -pw is not specified and an SSO logon does not take place, the SAP shortcut generally adds the Windows user ID to the corresponding field on the logon screen. This is useful if the Windows user ID and SAP system user ID are identical. If you do not want this behavior, you can set the following REG_DWORD registry value as of SAP GUI for Windows 7.50 Patch Level 10 and SAP GUI for Windows 7.60 Patch Level 0:
 
HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\Software\SAP\SAPShortcut\Options\InitializeUserAsEmpty (32-bit operating system or 64-bit operating system with a 64-bit version of SAP GUI for Windows)

HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\Software\WOW6432Node\SAP\SAPShortcut\Options\InitializeUserAsEmpty (64-bit operating system with a 32-bit version of SAP GUI for Windows)

HKEY_CURRENT_USER\Software\SAP\SAPShortcut\Options\InitializeUserAsEmpty (user-specific)

If this registry value is set to "1", the Windows user ID is not copied to the corresponding field on the logon screen; instead, the field remains empty. The read sequence of this registry value is HKEY_CURRENT_USER and then HKYE_LOCAL_MACHINE, which allows a user-specific setting. If this value does not exist, the Windows user ID is used.

 

All the best,

Lucas

entry.title: SAP BPA Decision Input Parameter
entry.content:
I have a requirement to consume the output of an custom API (GET action)  and evaluate some business rules (decision). However, i am not able to reference the API response dataType as decision Input parameter. 

As per help documentation "You can either select any of the Current Project data types that you created earlier or one of the Basic data types"

Does that mean I need to manually create the huge nested DataType (excel import option anyway doesn't work for nested data type and there is no option for importing json data model).

Hello Team,

I want to run this program, but when I reach the result screen with two ALVs and the option to generate my CDS for MDG, I see a black screen overlaying the ALVs, and I cannot do anything.

 

 

 

I am using a Mac with SAPGUI 7.70 rev8.

Do you have any idea how I can fix this issue?

As a workaround, I ask a colleague on Windows to perform the action, but it’s not very convenient.

The transaction is standard, and the three checkboxes are correctly marked.

 

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: EACCPS error Permission Denied Error while using Read file flow function
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am using" Read file " flow function in the build app to read a text file from android device. While running the app in preview using SAP build apps its showing error "EACCPS error Permission Denied" please refer attached screenshot. Any help will be appreciated. I checked build app permissions and this app is not asking for storage access permissions. I have  provided all other permissions.

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: SAP Developer News, January 16th, 2025
entry.content:
Podcast: https://podcast.opensap.info/sap-developers/2025/01/16/sap-developer-news-january-16th-2025/

DESCRIPTION

Upload Files from Build Apps to DMS, DOX and Other Services

  • Video #1: Set Up SAP Build Apps to Work with DMS – https://youtu.be/lhBB2mM9Nho
  • Video #2: Call DMS from SAP Build Apps – https://youtu.be/SJt_BzctwbI
  • Video #3: Upload a File from Build Apps to DMS – https://youtu.be/gIW_tHOaNuY
  • Free DMS projects: https://github.com/sap-tutorials/sap-build-apps/tree/main/projects/dms
  • Document Management Service Playlist: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL6RpkC85SLQCsKSvIOqMzFKW30B4TKXh-
  • Ming Kho’s blog post on Build Apps and DMS: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/sap-build-apps-upload-files-to-sap-document-management-service-dms/ba-p/13963628
  • Ming Kho’s blog post on Build Apps and DOX: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/sap-build-apps-upload-files-to-sap-document-information-extraction-dox/ba-p/13964007

CAP December 2024 Release

  • Release notes https://cap.cloud.sap/docs/releases/dec24

Joule ABAP Developer Capabilities Early Adopter Program

  • https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/campaign/3822

How to implement "readonly : update" for draft instances

  • https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/how-to-implement-quot-readonly-update-quot-for-draft-instances/ba-p/13981904

SAP Fiori Innovation Day & UI5 Road Map 2025

  • SAP Fiori Innovation Day Silicon Valley: https://events.sap.com/noam/sap-fiori-innovation-day-silicon-valley/en/home
  • UI5 Road Map Explorer: https://roadmaps.sap.com/board?PRODUCT=73554900100800001361&range=CURRENT-LAST#Q1%202025

CHAPTER TITLES

0:00 Intro
0:10 Upload Files from Build Apps to DMS, DOX and Other Services
1:51 CAP December 2024 Releas
5:06 Joule ABAP Developer Capabilities Early Adopter Program
6:02 How to implement "readonly : update" for draft instances
6:58 SAP Fiori Innovation Day & UI5 Road Map 2025

Transcription

[Intro] This is the SAP Developer News for January 16th, 2025.

[Daniel] SAP Build Apps has just released a new flow function that lets you upload documents to the BTP Document Management Service, the document information extraction service, or any service that requires a binary upload. Minko, a developer at SAP Build Apps, created the HTTP Destination and request flow function, which takes a multi-part request body and lets you specify a destination, both of which enable you to upload to the services. He has written two blogs, one on using it with DMS and one on using it with DMS, but I want to point out that I've just released three short videos on how to use this flow function with build apps and DMS, and I want to point out that I've just released three short videos on how to use this flow I've released an entire application that lets you navigate through a DMS repo. So it will list all the documents in the root or any folder in the DMS repo, let you upload documents, let you create folders, and let you delete folders and documents. All you need to do is attach your destination to your DMS repo. And I want to point out that we also have a playlist dedicated just to the document management service. It has videos on setting up DMS, unrelated to SAP Build, as well as how to use it with process automation, and build apps. Links to all of that content are in the description.

[DJ] While most of us were taking some time off over the holiday period recently, the CAP team has kept on working and put out another regular monthly release. December 24 of this. As usual, there are plenty of highlights, some of which I want to bring to your attention here. There are so many I've actually got a list and a read through. Got some notes. And this also sees CAP Node.js at 8.6 and CAP Java at 3.6. Okay, so what have we got? There are changes and improvements in the CDS language and compiler area, specifically For example, a completely rewritten CQN specification using TypeScript declaration files, which in turn brings about improved documentation and also some Intellisense operations that are also improved. There's a new beta feature where foreign key elements of managed associations can be explicitly annotated. Moving to the Node.js flavor of CAPs specifically, there are new compiler related life cycle events. They're also in beta. There are some enhancements to CDS Env. These enhancements relate to source formats and profile-specific endv files. And CDSQL has some enhancements. And these enhancements bring about a more robust operation in general and also some new functions for CQN object construction. In the OData arena, there are also some additions and improvements relating to the OData containment feature, and also a move to allow query option-based provision of function parameters, which some of you, I'm sure, will enjoy. In the Java flavor of CAP, there are some important changes in the area of NPM build plugin support, and also the new Calaisi plugin for the document management service is now open source. Last but not least, in the tools area, there are many enhancements to the CDS REPL. Some of you may have seen these enhancements sort of take shape over the course of the first six episodes of the art and science of CAP, a live stream series that we ran recently with the one and only Daniel Hutzl. So I'll put a link to that also in the description to this item, as well as the link to this December 2024. for Capphire release notes, but also for TypeScript developers out there, you can now just use CDS watch to start the server and it will automatically detect a TypeScript project and under the hood it will run CDSTSX for you. There's also more, even more, in this December 2024 release, but I'll leave it to you to go and check out the release notes in Capphire. Until then, see you online.

[Rich] Hey friends, Rich Heilman here. I just wanted to stop in a bit and let you know about the Joule ABAP Developer Capabilities Early Adopter Program for Customers and Partners. That's right, do you want to check out the Bleeding Edge technology helping ABAP developers become more efficient developers? If so, then go to the Influence. site and register for the early adopters program. Registration started on January 15th and will end on February 15th the same day we plan to release to customers. So again, if you are ready to get your hands dirty with AI and using Joule within ADT to help you with ABAP development, then please sign up for this excellent opportunity to try it out, give us some feedback, and make the product better for all. Thanks to ABAP developers, and we'll see you. See you soon. Bye for now.

[Sheena] You might have noticed that when a field is defined as Read Only for updates in a Draft-enabled application, it cannot be edited after an initial value is provided. Andre Fischer in his latest blog post explains how to achieve the editing of such fields in Draft using the dynamic feature control option. For this, just replace the statement read-only update with features instance in your behavior definition. Then in your behavior implementation method, verify whether an active instance of the entity already exists. If yes, the field will be made read only, however, if no active instance exists, the field will remain editable. Please note that this is applicable only when an object is being created as a draft and has not yet been persisted. Check out the details and sample code in the blog post link provided in the description.

[Nico] Hi everyone and welcome to the SAP Developer News. We have some updates in the Fiori and U5 area that we want to put your attention to. First of all, the SAP Fiori Innovation Day happens on February 5th in Silicon Valley. Definitely check it out if you're in the area. AI is going to be a hot topic, there's going to be a partner session, hands -on sessions and an outlook from the Fiori team on what's to come in the future. Check out the link to register in the future. the description of this video. And also related to Fiori, more UI5. The 2025 Roadmap is out now. Go check it out. If you're interested in UI5, there's some interesting items on there, and go follow. All right, check it out. Hope you see you soon. Bye.

entry.title: Object modified timestamp SAP ASE 16
entry.content:
How do I return the last modified date for an object in the database? Say that I want to grab a list of all objects added/changed in the database in the last week, how do I do that? The list needs to include views, tables, procedures, functions; basically all objects that can suffer DDL changes.

I'm using Adaptive Server Enterprise/16.0 SP04 PL01/EBF 29704 SMP/P/x86_64/SLES 12.4/ase160sp04pl01x/3473/64-bit/FBO/Tue Jul 20 07:58:11 2021

entry.title: Re: In SAP Screen personas scripting how to give a beep s...
entry.content: A script giving the beep sound, assigned to the onLoad event of the screen will do the trick.

entry.title: Re: Disenchantment: GPT for generating ABAP code documentation
entry.content:
@paulmodderman Unfortunately, I'm using a company portal which is "Using publicly trained GPT model". No idea what is behind it. I shouldn't have used the name "ChatGPT" (let me fix that). I agree that I need to refine my prompts till I get something useful. Probably that the biggest problem is that I can't ask a question with a long text, and I can't attach a file. The code is something like 15.000 lines of code, if I can post 30 lines of code each time, that would require 500 questions to obtain something. If I spend a "lot of time" for each few lines of code to build a useful answer, it will take days (weeks?) to obtain something useful. I feel that it's not worth the pain, and I can write myself the "answer". I also need to verify that the answers correspond to what the program really does, that all the answers are consistent. Very tough job.

@Jelena_Perfiljeva Yes, with better prompts come better results; that would require lots of efforts to obtain something equivalent to what humans would do. I tried GenAI because there's no functional specification at all; it is my task to reverse-engineer the code to write the functional specification. Also, I'm quite pessimistic about what can do GenAI because the program is so badly written that it is very complex to understand by humans. In the end, I have manually understood the program (as far as I could) and written the specification, but I'm still interested in finding a better solution for such "stupid" tasks.

entry.title: Re: SAP A.I. Privacy and Security
entry.content: This is very helpful, thank you Mario.

entry.title: How to see in database when 2 sales order is linked
entry.content:
Hi,

there is a sales order in ByDesign.

Under the Sales orders overview page I click on Follow up->sales orders, then a new sales order will be created.

The document flow shows the link between them.

Is it possibble to select this preceeding document and the new sales order in a report?

I would like to answer that question by sales team, that is there any linked sales order for a new sales order.

 

Thanks, E

entry.title: Re: SSO on Web Client
entry.content:
Hi @hdolenec, please read the chapter about the Identity Authentication Management in the Admin Guide:
https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_BUSINESS_ONE_ADMIN_GUIDE_SQL/f6fb230cc90949d8b66586a39189992b/64e276099fe94d88aef5d7ec022ac70f.html?q=identity

Best regards and great success,
Darius

entry.title: Re: Obtain logged in users User ID/Student ID value for l...
entry.content: @N_Nolan, about the embedding question, as I understand, that's currently not possible. As far as I could see, the directly links aren't user related.
